deviations.decision: The package development repository declares root-only Composer package repositories for the accepted Larena dependency closure while normal package requirements remain dev-main.
deviations.reason: The accepted package revisions do not have release tags and branch aliases alone do not reproduce the exact dependency closure.
deviations.guard: composer.lock and DependencyCompatibilityContractTest require all eleven exact source revisions; repository metadata is not inherited by downstream Composer roots.
deviations.follow_up: The isolated Root candidate must own and verify its own exact revision composition.
